# Test Fixtures

`ovrtx_feature_scene.usda` is an original OmniverseMakie.jl test fixture. It
contains no NVIDIA sample scene content and is intended only to exercise the raw
OVRTX FFI path in tests:

- `/Render/OVMakie/RenderProduct`
- `/World/Camera`
- `/World/Sun`
- `/World/FeatureBox`
- `/World/Looks/FeatureMaterial`

The fixture is dedicated to the public domain via CC0-1.0 where legally
possible.
